name: Red Lobster Cheese Rolls
recipeInstructions:
These freeze well.
Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
Mix Bisquick, water and cheese. Drop by large spoonfuls onto greased baking sheet. Bake for 8-10 minutes.
After baking, brush on melted butter or margarine mixed with garlic powder, parsley flakes and Italian seasoning (Amounts will vary by the size batch you make, but a little goes a long way).
Serve hot. This makes about 10 biscuits. You may also substitute soda water or ginger ale for the water, if desired.
